price: „Bei Allah, wir befanden uns wahrlich in deutlichem Irrtum,
arabic: تَٱللَّهِ إِن كُنَّا لَفِي ضَلَٰلٖ مُّبِينٍ

version.title: German Translation - Bubenheim
version.description: Translation of the Quran meanings into German by Abdullah As-Samit (Frank Bubenheim) and Dr. Nadeem Elyas

meta.transliteration: tal-lahi in kunnā lafī ḍalālin mubīnin
